# ANALYSIS: LBFS_VIX_GATED_ATM real-fills verification (last 20 live signals since 2026-06-01)

**Filed:** 2026-06-21  
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)  
**Type:** verification  
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

We hypothesize that the chart-stop-only execution for LBFS_VIX_GATED_ATM signals since 2026-06-01 will produce P&L consistent with the historical real-fills performance (WR~58.8%, +$763) within statistical variance, and that slippage and fill-rate deviations will be minimal (<10% slippage, fill rate >90%).

## Mechanism

We will extract the last 20 live signals from the LBFS_VIX_GATED_ATM watcher observations since 2026-06-01, simulate chart-stop-only execution with premium_stop=-0.99, compare to simulator expectations (BS-sim or realistic simulator), compute slippage (difference between expected fill price and actual fill price) and fill-rate (percentage of signals that resulted in a fill). Log any deviations.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=28 requires $25K+; $1K paper ~= 14% headline. For LBFS_VIX_GATED_ATM, standard position sizing per risk-rules.md: $25K account → qty=15 contracts; $1K paper → qty=3 contracts (~14% of headline).
2. **Sample bias:** sample size = 20 live signals since 2026-06-01, selection method = most recent 20 signals, overfit risk = low (forward-looking verification).
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (verification window is out-of-sample relative to historical real-fills backtest).
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (to be completed via analysis of last 20 live signals).
5. **Failure modes:** worst day could be a false break leading to -$589 (observed for OTM-1 variant); with break_below_cents_min=100 filter, worst day likely limited to -$200 per contract; max drawdown scenario: consecutive losses during choppy markets; blow-up scenario: failure of level-break detection during high-VIX expansion.
6. **Concentration:** unknown -- requires analysis of P&L distribution across the 20 signals.

## Pre-merge gate

- Real-fills verification must show: P&L within ±20% of simulator expectations, fill rate ≥80%, average slippage <10% of premium.
- Gym validators pass (no changes to engine logic).
- Walk-forward analysis on verification window shows no severe regime degradation.

## Confidence

3 / 10 -- pending verification of last 20 live signals since 2026-06-01.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

LBFS_VIX_GATED_ATM is currently WATCH-ONLY (rank 18) with OP-21 N≥15 gate passed and real-fills quantitative gates PASS. Sole remaining gate: 3 live J-confirmed VIX≥20 LBFS observations. This verification will assess real-fills performance for recent signals; if results align with historical expectations (+$763 P&L, WR~58.8%), it strengthens the case for promotion to PROMISING or J-RATIFIED after satisfying the live observation gate. No conflict with existing candidates; complements watcher-class candidates by providing empirical validation.
